tagline: Lakehouse Real Time (Lakehouse//RT) is now in Beta.
what_it_does: Lakehouse Real Time (Lakehouse//RT) is now in Beta. Lakehouse//RT is a serverless SQL warehouse type built for low latency, high concurrency workloads, delivering sub second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables. Use it to serve analytical data to applications, run operational analytics, and power dashboards for hundreds to thousands of concurrent users.
why_it_matters: Lakehouse//RT is a serverless SQL warehouse type built for low latency, high concurrency workloads, delivering sub second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables.

capabilities.desc: Databricks SQL Connector for Python: Set usekernel=True.

capabilities.desc: Databricks SQL Driver for Node.js: Set useKernel: true.
